heading: WEIR FARM NATIONAL HISTORICAL PARK
label: LIX–DDD WEIR FARM NATIONAL HISTORICAL PARK
notes: Codification, which enacted this subchapter, originally established the Weir Farm National Historic Site, which is listed in a table of National Historic Sites under , National Park Service and Related Programs. The amendments made by effectively redesignated the site as the Weir Farm National Historical Park, after which the text of was set out as this subchapter.Pub.
